targets.expr: count(oie_instance_info{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Filtered Instances
panels.description: Number of instances matching current hypervisor/project/instance filters.

targets.expr: sum(oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_count{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Filtered vCPUs
panels.description: Total vCPUs allocated to filtered instances.

targets.expr: sum(oie_instance_mem_allocated_mb{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"}) / 1024

panels.title: Filtered RAM Allocated (GB)
panels.description: Total RAM allocated to filtered instances, in GB.

targets.expr: avg(oie_instance_attention_score{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Avg Attention Score
panels.description: Average attention score across filtered instances.

panels.title: Instance Overview
panels.description: High-level summary of instances matching the selected filters.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_attention_score{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Attention Score (Top 100)
panels.description: Per-instance attention score, showing the top 100 highest scores.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_resource_score{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Resource Score (Top 100)
panels.description: Per-instance resource utilization score, top 100 by score.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_threat_score{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Threat Score (Top 100)
panels.description: Per-instance threat score from threat lists and behavior, top 100.

panels.title: Instance Scores (Top 100)
panels.description: Scoring breakdown (attention, resource, threat) for the busiest instances.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_percent{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance vCPU Usage (%) (Top 100)
panels.description: vCPU utilization percentage per instance, top 100 by usage.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_mem_used_mb{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Memory Used (MB, Top 100)
panels.description: Absolute memory usage (MB) per instance, top 100.

panels.title: Instance Memory Used vs Allocated (%)
panels.description: Memory utilization as a percentage of allocated memory per instance, top 100.

panels.title: Instance CPU & Memory Usage
panels.description: CPU and memory utilization views for the busiest instances.

panels.title: Instance Disk Read Throughput (GB/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Aggregate disk read throughput per instance (GB/s), top 100.

panels.title: Instance Disk Write Throughput (GB/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Aggregate disk write throughput per instance (GB/s), top 100.

targets.expr:
topk(100, sum by (instance_uuid, instance, project_name, project_uuid) (
  rate(oie_instance_disk_read_requests_total{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"}[1m])
+ rate(oie_instance_disk_write_requests_total{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"}[1m])
))

panels.title: Instance Disk IOPS (Top 100)
panels.description: Total disk IOPS (read + write) per instance, top 100.

panels.title: Instance Disk Read by Disk (GB/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Disk read throughput by disk (GB/s), top 100 volumes across instances.

panels.title: Instance Disk Write by Disk (GB/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Disk write throughput by disk (GB/s), top 100 volumes across instances.

panels.title: Instance Disk Read IOPS by Disk (Top 100)
panels.description: Read IOPS by disk, top 100 volumes across instances.

panels.title: Instance Disk Write IOPS by Disk (Top 100)
panels.description: Write IOPS by disk, top 100 volumes across instances.

panels.title: Instance Disk I/O
panels.description: Disk throughput and IOPS at instance and per-volume granularity.

panels.title: Instance RX Packets per Second (Top 100)
panels.description: Inbound packets per second per instance, top 100.

panels.title: Instance TX Packets per Second (Top 100)
panels.description: Outbound packets per second per instance, top 100.

panels.title: Instance RX Network Throughput (Gbit/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Inbound network throughput per instance (Gbit/s), top 100.

panels.title: Instance TX Network Throughput (Gbit/s, Top 100)
panels.description: Outbound network throughput per instance (Gbit/s), top 100.

panels.title: Instance Network Usage
panels.description: Packet and bandwidth views for instance network activity.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Conntrack Total Flows (Top 100)

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_outbound{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Conntrack Outbound Flows (Top 100)
panels.description: Outbound conntrack flows per instance, top 100.

targets.expr: topk(100, oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_inbound{job="openstack-instance-exporter", instance=~"$gvar_oie_hypervisor", project_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_project_uuid", project_name=~"$gvar_oie_project_name", instance_uuid=~"$gvar_oie_instance_uuid"})

panels.title: Instance Conntrack Inbound Flows (Top 100)
panels.description: Inbound conntrack flows per instance, top 100.
